'''Astroserver Industries''' was an equipment manufacturer that produced [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking devices]]. It made the [[Rover (surveillance tagger)|Rover]] and [[Trailmaster]] [[Surveillance tagger/Legends|surveillance taggers]].<ref name="FOP" />

{{Company-stub}}
